repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90019 by preserving the memory-search periodic sync fallback behavior while addressing the failing build-artifacts and runtime topology checks on the maintainer-editable branch.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair plan for #90019.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90019 by @sahibzada-allahyar.

Scope: keep the contributor's memory-search sync interval default and dirty-rescan fallback, then make the smallest changes needed to clear the failing build-artifacts and runtime topology checks.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/memory-search.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-sync-ops.interval.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Credit: preserve @sahibzada-allahyar's attribution as the source PR author.
credit_notes: Preserve attribution for sahibzada-allahyar as the author of source PR #90019.
Any repair commit or replacement description should state that #90019 supplied the original memory-search fallback fix and tests.
